name: BM Acquisition Corp.
business: BM Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on May 9, 2025. Its business purpose is to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has not identified a specific acquisition target and has no operations or revenues.

exposures.sentence: Businesses primarily operating in Southeast Asia, capitalizing on the region’s rapid economic growth, favorable demographics, expanding digital economy, and increasing global investment interest.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have until 18 months from the closing of our initial public offering, subject to extension up to 21 months by means of three one-month extensions provided that $0.033 per public share is deposited into the trust account for each extension and provided that the Company has entered into an agreement for an initial business combination within that 18 month period.

tamClaims.claim: Southeast Asia combined GDP reached nearly USD 4 trillion in 2024 with 4.6% growth and projected 4.7% growth for 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: A study by Andaman Partners issued in June 2025 indicates that the region’s combined GDP of the eleven economies reached nearly USD 4 trillion in 2024, with a 4.6% growth rate, and a projected 4.7% growth for 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Southeast Asia is projected to surpass China in GDP growth and foreign direct investment over the next decade.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Bain & Company, issued August 1, 2024, Southeast Asia is projected to surpass China in GDP growth and foreign direct investment over the next decade.
